boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations release a routine action when the dependency closure must match the requested object, scope, and release condition?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact match on object, account, scope, condition, and pre-release timestamp per source records.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: DEP-BAP-001 and MATCH-BAP-001 confirm exact match before execution.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No narrow source-record defect remains open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: DEP-BAP-001 closure at 09:05 precedes 10:30 queue; MATCH-BAP-001 standard satisfied; ENTITLE-BAP-001, MAP-BAP-001, ROSTER-BAP-001 confirm active account, source object, and scope.

final_answer: The action may proceed. The dependency closure (DEP-BAP-001) precisely matches the requested object (OBJ-BAP-001), account (ACCT-BAP-001), scope (BAP production scope 001), and release condition (RC-BAP-001). The closure completion at 09:05 precedes the queued release at 10:30. The dependency matching standard (MATCH-BAP-001) is satisfied. Entitlement, scope map, and roster records confirm active account and source object status. The source boundary is confirmed closed.
